title: hicorius ovata
intro: Hicorius ovata, also known as American water hawthorn or Hicoria ovata, is a deciduous tree native to the eastern and central regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Hicorius ovata lie in its bark, which contains various compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and exhibit antiseptic properties to prevent infections. Hicorius ovata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction to be consumed for its medicinal purposes.
